Reasoning (concise): Tracked the person’s center y-position over time (y=0 top). A pull-up corresponds to one full up–down cycle: moving to a clear local minimum y (top position) then returning to a clear local maximum y (bottom position). The trajectory shows three such complete cycles (peaks around frames ~0, ~140, ~320; troughs around ~45, ~235, ~425), so total pull-ups = 3.
